name: Navjot Singh Chahal
title: Engineer | Robotics & Autonomous Systems | ML & Backends
tagline: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of robotics, machine learning, and scalable backend engineering.
bio: I am an engineer at the University of Pennsylvania with a passion for robotics, autonomous systems, quantum algorithms, deep learning, and backend development. I enjoy working across the stack — from low-level control systems and computer vision on embedded hardware to scalable JVM and web backends in Java, Scala, and Node.js.
